api_contracts.method: PUT /{'id': 'behavior_1', 'name': 'sendeboksamplify', 'description': 'sends eboks message to private person via kvhx address lookup (amplify strategy). generates html document (iso-8859-1), base64-encodes it, builds xml envelope (urn:eboks:en:3.0.0), and puts to e-boks rest api. recipient type kp (no first name) or kfp (with first name derived from owner name). on success sets status 752/753.', 'trigger': 'smsstatuscode.eboksamplifyafventer750 batch job', 'source_file': 'servicealert.services/gateways/eboksgateway/eboksamplifyworkloadprocessor.cs'}

PATCH /{'id': 'behavior_2', 'name': 'sendebokscvr', 'description': 'sends eboks message to company via cvr number (v type recipient). same html/base64/xml envelope pattern as amplify. url: https://api.e-boks.com/int/rest/srv.svc/3/dispatchsystem/{sysid}/dispatches/{paddedsysid}{guid}. on success sets status 802 (ebokscvrafsendt802).', 'trigger': 'smsstatuscode.ebokscvrafventer batch job', 'source_file': 'servicealert.services/gateways/eboksgateway/ebokscvrworkloadprocessor.cs'}

POST /{'id': 'behavior_4', 'name': 'createorupdateeboksmessage', 'description': 'persists eboksmessage (smslogid, headline, text, guid, datesentutc, numberofreceivers) via merge/upsert in repository before and after sending. pre-send: without datesentutc. post-send: with datesentutc set to utcnow.', 'trigger': 'before and after http dispatch', 'source_file': 'servicealert.services/eboks/eboksservice.cs'}

PATCH /{'id': 'behavior_6', 'name': 'testmodedispatch', 'description': 'in test mode, no http call is made. nextstatus is set from a shuffled result array: cvr uses {802, 803}, amplify uses weighted array {0,0,0,0,0,1,1,2}. statistic record is not created in test mode.', 'trigger': 'item.data.testmode == true', 'source_file': 'servicealert.services/gateways/eboksgateway/ebokscvrworkloadprocessor.cs, eboksamplifyworkloadprocessor.cs'}

POST /{'id': 'behavior_8', 'name': 'recordeboksstatistic', 'description': 'after successful (non-test) send, creates eboksmessagestatistic with smslogid and byte size of the html document.', 'trigger': 'post-http-success, non-test mode', 'source_file': 'servicealert.services/gateways/eboksgateway/ebokscvrworkloadprocessor.cs'}

authorization_hints: {'id': 'behavior_5', 'name': 'HasEboksCheck', 'description': 'Checks whether a customer/profile is permitted to send via eBoks. Profile-scoped: checks ProfileRoleNames.CanSendByEboks on specific profile and validates profile belongs to customer. Customer-scoped: any profile with CanSendByEboks role.', 'trigger': 'Pre-dispatch permission check', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Eboks/EboksService.cs'}

blazor_pages.component: {'id': 'behavior_1', 'name': 'SendEboksAmplify', 'description': 'Sends eBoks message to private person via KVHX address lookup (Amplify strategy). Generates HTML document (ISO-8859-1), base64-encodes it, builds XML envelope (urn:eboks:en:3.0.0), and PUTs to e-boks REST API. Recipient type KP (no first name) or KFP (with first name derived from owner name). On success sets status 752/753.', 'trigger': 'SmsStatusCode.EboksAmplifyAfventer750 batch job', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Gateways/EboksGateway/EboksAmplifyWorkloadProcessor.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_2', 'name': 'SendEboksCvr', 'description': 'Sends eBoks message to company via CVR number (V type recipient). Same HTML/base64/XML envelope pattern as Amplify. URL: https://api.e-boks.com/int/rest/srv.svc/3/dispatchsystem/{sysId}/dispatches/{paddedSysId}{guid}. On success sets status 802 (EboksCvrAfsendt802).', 'trigger': 'SmsStatusCode.EboksCvrAfventer batch job', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Gateways/EboksGateway/EboksCvrWorkloadProcessor.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_4', 'name': 'CreateOrUpdateEboksMessage', 'description': 'Persists EboksMessage (SmsLogId, Headline, Text, Guid, DateSentUtc, NumberOfReceivers) via MERGE/upsert in repository before and after sending. Pre-send: without DateSentUtc. Post-send: with DateSentUtc set to UtcNow.', 'trigger': 'Before and after HTTP dispatch', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Eboks/EboksService.cs'}

rules: Amplify chunk sizes: normal=2000, firstRetry=1000, secondRetry=200.
Amplify retry order: secondRetry (762→772) before firstRetry (761→771) before normal (750→751). RoundRobin with priority.
Amplify strategy selection: EboksStrategies enum — NoEboks=0, EboksAll=1, SmsFirst=2, EboksFirst=3.
CVR recipients use Type=V (company). Amplify recipients use Type=KP (no first name) or KFP (with first name from owner name stripping ' (Ejer)' suffix and taking everything before last space).
Document encoding MUST be ISO-8859-1 (Latin1). HTML is base64-encoded before transmission.
EboksMessage GUID is item.Data.Guid if present, else Guid.NewGuid(). GUID is stable across retry — used as idempotency key in URL.
In test mode: no HTTP call, no statistic creation, NextStatus from shuffled result array.
MarkSmsGroupsSentAsync is called after batch completes — only for workloads where NextStatus is terminal (802/803 for CVR, 752/753 for Amplify).
Parallel dispatch: MaxDegreeOfParallelism=15 (both CVR and Amplify processors).
Status updates are written via IWorkloadStatusWriter after batch — not per-message.
XML namespace MUST be urn:eboks:en:3.0.0. Declaration: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>.
if truly empty (use empty list, not null).
must be plain English or well-known identifiers.
